description: A gamified habit and task tracking application designed to make productivity feel like a playful, rewarding game. It uses neo-brutalist design patterns with soft pastel backgrounds, bold black outlines, chunky solid shadows, and vibrant accent colors to create a tactile 'bento box' experience. Badges, visual progress, and bright interactive elements are key.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing, The Bento Grid, Solid Neobrutalism

cards.style: bg-white border-2 border-[#1E1E24] rounded-2xl shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(30,30,36,1)] overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-[#EF476F] text-white border-2 border-[#1E1E24] rounded-xl shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(30,30,36,1)] font-bold px-6 py-3 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(30,30,36,1)] active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-[0px_0px_0px_0px_rgba(30,30,36,1)] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-[#FFD166] text-[#1E1E24] border-2 border-[#1E1E24] rounded-xl shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(30,30,36,1)] font-bold px-6 py-3 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(30,30,36,1)] active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-[0px_0px_0px_0px_rgba(30,30,36,1)] transition-all
buttons.outline: bg-white text-[#1E1E24] border-2 border-[#1E1E24] rounded-xl shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(30,30,36,1)] font-bold px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#F3F0EA] transition-all

inputs.style: bg-white border-2 border-[#1E1E24] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 font-medium shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(30,30,36,1)] focus:outline-none focus:ring-4 focus:ring-[#118AB2]/30 focus:border-[#118AB2] transition-all

badges.easy: bg-[#06D6A0] text-[#1E1E24] border-2 border-[#1E1E24] rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold
badges.medium: bg-[#FFD166] text-[#1E1E24] border-2 border-[#1E1E24] rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold
badges.hard: bg-[#EF476F] text-white border-2 border-[#1E1E24] rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold
badges.coin: bg-[#FFD166] text-[#1E1E24] border-2 border-[#1E1E24] rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-sm font-black flex items-center gap-1 shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(30,30,36,1)]

interactions.hover: All interactive elements MUST have explicit hover states (color change + transform/shadow shift).
interactions.active: Buttons MUST press down (remove shadow, translate-y down) to feel like physical arcade buttons.
interactions.focus: Use high-contrast focus rings, e.g., focus:ring-4 focus:ring-[#118AB2]/50.

onboarding_hero.description: Colorful 3D geometric shapes to use on the login/onboarding screen to set a playful tone.

rewards_banner.description: Colorful gift boxes to use in the Rewards Shop section as a header or empty state.

media.icons_strategy: lucide-react (Use default stroke width 2.5 or 3 for a bolder, cartoony look)

instructions_to_main_agent: Apply the Neo-Brutalist Playful style to all UI elements: Use solid borders (border-2 border-black) and solid unblurred offset box-shadows (shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]).
Ensure all buttons have an active state that pushes them 'down' by removing the shadow and applying a translate-y equivalent to the shadow depth.
Use the Outfit font for headings (make them bold/black) and Nunito for body text.
Build a Bento Grid layout for the Dashboard. Include a 'Hero/Stats' card, a 'Today's Habits' list, and a 'Pending Tasks' list.
Use distinct colors for difficulty levels: Easy (#06D6A0), Medium (#FFD166), Hard (#EF476F).
Always display the user's Coin balance prominently in the top navigation with a gold coin icon (lucide-react 'Coins' or 'CircleDollarSign').
Add `data-testid` to all forms, inputs, buttons, and reward redemption actions.
Use Shadcn UI but heavily override its default styling to match the chunky, gamified aesthetic provided in the components section.
Create a visual difference between Habits (recurring, maybe use a flame icon for streaks) and Tasks (one-time, standard checkbox).
The UI should look like a fun modern game dashboard, not a generic SaaS tool.
